source: Graph Convolutional Neural Networks for Web-Scale Recommender Systems

concepts.finding: Inductive graph embedding: learn aggregation functions that can embed new/unseen nodes without retraining. PinSage at Pinterest: random-walk-based neighbor sampling + attention aggregation for web-scale graph embedding (3B nodes, 18B edges). 99%+ coverage of daily active pins.
concepts.implication: Inductive GNN methods can embed new keywords without retraining by aggregating features from their neighbors in the co-occurrence graph. This addresses the cold-start keyword problem.
concepts.open_question: Can inductive GNN methods generalize to new keywords with only textual features (no historical co-occurrences)?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: An inductive GNN (GraphSAGE) for keyword embeddings achieves 80%+ OOV recall for new keyword intent prediction.
